text.value: Other means of travel to household
Method to select date of birth - date or year of birth
_The registration process for this kaya is now complete._

SAY: For each person, I will ask some basic details about who they are, starting with the primary contact person for this household. Who should I list as the primary contact for this household, who will be the person I reach out to coordinate care for themselves and other members of this household? This person should be reachable by phone.

Ask the person to list the names of all people who live in the house, and count to ensure that the number they provided is correct. Long term visitors to the house, such as a woman returning home for delivery, should not be counted - only people who are permanent residents of the house.
Kayas can have between 1 and 30 members
ASK: How many people live in your Kaya?
Enter the entire house number separated by slashes

_The purpose of the following questions regarding the household location is to help you locate this house again when it is time to return for another visit to the people who live here. Enter the information that you will need to help you easily find this house again when you need to before you approach the household. What is the address of this household?_
How do you travel between your home and this home?
Enter a number between 1 and 120. Please discuss with your supervisor if it is taking you more than two hours to reach a client's house.
How many minutes does it take you to travel between this home and your home?
Calculated age must be between 12 and 100!
ASK: What is 's date of birth?
ASK: Do you know 's exact date of birth?
ASK: What is their family name?
ASK: What is the first name of the best contact person for your household?
Use one of the following formats: +255XXXXXXXXX or 0XXXXXXXXX.
ASK: What is the best contact phone number for ?
You can leave this blank if there is only one good contact number for this household
Use one of the following formats: +255XXXXXXXXX or 0XXXXXXXXX.
ASK: Is there another phone number used by or another member of the household?
ASK: In what year was born?
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
date of birth: under_5_flag: is reproductive age:
You've entered a birthdate either in the future or very long ago - confirm that you've entered it properly.
ASK: What is 's date of birth?
ASK: Do you know 's exact date of birth?
ASK: What is their family name?
ASK: What is their first name?
Now, please enter information for the other members of the kaya.

SAY: From this registration, I've seen that you have a child under 5 who can benefit from this national program. Therefore, I'm asking for your permission to come back and check up on all issues related to their health care, nutrition, and child development. I would be grateful for your permission.

SAY: I see that there are some women of reproductive age in your family. I'd like to ask your permission to return later to speak with them personally about issues related to health during pregnancy and childbirth.
For children under 5 years of age, a more exact birthdate must be captured. Please select "Yes" to the prior question and do your best to capture more exact birthdate information about the child.
ASK: In what year was born?

SEMA: Kwa kila mmoja, nitawauliza baadhi ya taarifa za msingi za utambulisho wenu, tukianza na mtu ambaye naweza kuwasiliana naye kwenye nyumba hii. Je ni nani nimuorodheshe kama mtu wa kuwasiliana naye kwenye kaya hii ? Je, ni nani atakayekuwa mtu ninayeweza kukutana naye ili kuratibu utowaji wa huduma kwake mwenyewe na watu wengine walioko kwenye familia? Mtu huyu awe anapatikana kupitia mawasiliano ya simu.

Muombe mwenyeji wako aorodheshe majina ya watu wanaoishi kwenye kaya, na hesabu ili kuhakikisha idadi ni sawa. Usiwahesabu wageni walikokuja kutembea kwa muda mrefu, mfano wanawake walikuja nyumbani ili kujifungua, hesabu wakaazi wakudumu peke yao.
Kaya iwe kati ya mtu 1 hadi watu 30.
ULIZA: Ni watu wangapi wanaishi kwenye kaya yako?
Ingiza nambari ya nyumba yote na tenganisha kwa kutumia alama ya Mkwaju

Lengo la maswali haya yanayouliza kuhusu eneo la kaya ni kwajili ya kukusaidia kuweza kuitambua kwa urahisi kaya wakati wa kutaka kurudia kufanya matembeleo mengine kwa watu wanaoishi humu. Ingiza taarifa zitazoweza kukusaidia kiurahisi kuitambua kaya hii pindi unapotaka kuirudia tena. Kabla ya kuifika kaya hii. Ni ipi anuani ya nyumba hii?
Pikipiki/vespa au vyombo vya maringi mawili vinavyotumia mafuta
Jaza nambari kati ya 1 na 120. Tafadhali zungumza na msimamizi wako kama inakuchukua masaa mawili kufika katika nyumba ya mteja wako.
Ni dakika ngapi unatumia kutoka nyumbani kwenu hadi kwenye nyumba hii?
Umri uliohesabiwa ni lazima uwe kati ya miaka 12 na 100
ULIZA: Je ni ipi tarehe yake kuzaliwa?
ULIZA: Je unaijua tarehe sahihi yake ya kuzaliwa?
ULIZA: Ni lipi jina la babu yake?
ULIZA: ni lipi jina la kwanza la mtu ambaye naweza kuwasiliana naye kwenye kaya yenu?
Tumia moja kati ya mfumo huu +255XXXXXXXXX au 0XXXXXXXXX.
ULIZA: Je ni ipi nambari yake nzuri ya mawasilaano?
Unaweza acha pengo usijijaze chochote kama kuna nambari moja tu ya mawasiliano kwenye kaya hii
Tumia moja kati ya mfumo huu +255XXXXXXXXX au 0XXXXXXXXX.
ULIZA: Je kuna nambari ya ziada anayotumia kuwasilaina?
Umri uwe ni kati ya 12 na 100!
Je umeingiza umri sahihi- hakikisha umeingiza kwa usahihi. Kwa watoto walio chini ya miaka 5, hakikisha kuwa tarehe yao si ya Zaidi ya miaka 5 nyuma.
ULIZA: Ipi ni tarehe yake kuzaliwa
ULIZA: Je unaijua terehe yake ya kuzaliwa kwa usahihi?
ULIZA: Ni lipi jina lake la babu?
ULIZA: Ni lipi jina lake la kwanza?
Sasa, tafadhali ingiza taarifa za watu wengine wanaoishi kwenye kaya.

SEMA kutokanana usajili huu nimeona kuna watoto walio chini ya umri wa miaka 5 ambao wanaweza kunufaika na mradi huu wa kitaifa. Kwahivyo naomba ridhaa ya kurudi tena ili nije kuangalia maswala yote yanayohusiana na huduma zao za afya, lishe, na maendeleo yao. Nitafurahi kama nitapata ridhaa yenu.

SEMA: Nimeona kuna baadhi ya wanawake walio katika umri wa uzazi katika kaya yako. Ningeomba ridhaa yako kurudia ili kuja kuzungumza nao mambo muhimu ya afya kipindi cha ujauzito na baada ya kujifungua.
Kwa watoto walio chini ya umri wa miaka 5, tarehe yake yao ya kuzaliwa nilazima ichukuliwe.

bind.calculate: if( /data/repeat/child/sex_c ="female" and ((((decimal-date-time(today()) - decimal-date-time( /data/repeat/child/date_of_birth_c )) div 365) >= 15 and ((decimal-date-time(today()) - decimal-date-time( /data/repeat/child/date_of_birth_c )) div 365) <= 49)),int(1),int(0))
